hooks.command:
if [ -z "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" ]; then exit 0; fi
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in
  *.rs)
    command -v rustfmt >/dev/null 2>&1 && rustfmt "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true
    ;;
esac

echo ""
echo "📊 Test Summary:"
if [ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_EXIT_CODE" -eq 0 ]; then
  echo "✅ All tests passed!"
else
  echo "❌ Some tests failed. Review output above."
fi

set -e
cd /home/nan/PycharmProjects/Gecko/gecko-social-fi-creators-contracts
echo "🔍 Pre-commit: fmt + clippy..."
cargo fmt --check || { cargo fmt; exit 1; }
cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings || exit 1
echo "✅ Pre-commit checks passed"

set -e
echo "🚨 PRE-DEPLOY CHECKS"
NETWORK=$(solana config get | grep 'RPC URL' | awk '{print $3}')
echo "Network: $NETWORK"
if echo "$NETWORK" | grep -q mainnet; then
  echo "⚠️  MAINNET DEPLOY — type 'DEPLOY TO MAINNET' to continue:"
  read -r CONFIRM
  [ "$CONFIRM" = "DEPLOY TO MAINNET" ] || exit 1
fi
ls target/deploy/*.so >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "❌ No .so build found — run anchor build first"; exit 1; }
echo "✅ Pre-deploy checks passed"
